component.name: LAMMPS-GUI
component.summary: Graphical interface to edit, run, plot, and visualize simulations with the LAMMPS MD code

description.p: LAMMPS-GUI is an editor customized for editing input files for the LAMMPS MD simulation software. It also includes LAMMPS and thus can run it directly from the GUI. Furthermore it has facilities to create or view and animate snapshot images, monitor and plot thermodynamic properties and show the console output of the running simulation.

ul.li: Replace the QtCharts and QtGraphs chart backends with a single self-contained native renderer (a QWidget plus QPainter 2D line and scatter plotter) so charts look and behave identically on every platform and Qt version, the build no longer depends on the Qt Charts or Qt Graphs modules, and a Qt-free axis-layout core (nice ticks, label formatting) is shared by all plots
Collapse the multi-view chart layout into one shared plot widget that is rebound as you switch the displayed property, reducing memory use and redraw overhead
Add an optional in-plot legend with a placement selector in the Chart Style dialog (off or any of the four corners), remembered across sessions

Add reference lines to the chart window: vertical or horizontal annotation lines drawn on every chart with per-line label, color, and label anchor, plus window-wide label font size, gap, and optional boxed labels
Add an independent point-size control for the raw and processed series in the Chart Style dialog and enlarge the default point size
Render snapshot images for input decks that keep a "fix graphics/labels" color scale: the snapshot viewer now satisfies the fix's dump dependency instead of aborting the render

Several chart refinements and fixes: keep the zoom and range sliders consistent when adding reference lines or switching between raw and smoothed data, bold titles and dashed minor grid lines, adaptive tick precision, and corrected processed-series labeling

Performance: remove per-point QSettings reads and O(N) rescans from the live thermo update path, coalesce the log warnings-summary repaint, and restyle the CPU-usage label only when its color bucket changes
Convert the AppStream metadata to a valid format

Further internal refactoring for consistency and testability: store image colors as QString, factor shared dialog and parser helpers, confine the Lepton expression boundary behind a compiled-expression type, and update the source file map

Reorganize the tutorials into multiple collections: rename the existing set to "Soft Matter", number the collections in the menu, add a new "Materials Science" collection (14 tutorials with per-tutorial logos and descriptions, released incrementally as their text is finalized), and add a placeholder for a planned "Granular / DEM" collection

Make the snapshot-image color maps a single source of truth shared by the dump command builder and the preview swatches; correct Viridis, Plasma, and Inferno to canonical matplotlib values and add Magma, Cividis, and Turbo
Color bonds by a per-bond compute value with an independent bond color map and range, give bonds an independent opacity, and add a background gradient toggle to the snapshot viewer
Emit only the dump-image settings that differ from the LAMMPS defaults, producing cleaner and more portable image commands
Document the multi-collection tutorials and how to add or update a tutorial collection, the bond color/opacity options, and the color maps
Update internal data tables (help and image-style index) and packaging scripts
Add a "Plot Data File..." import dialog and menu entry to plot external data files (whitespace/.dat, CSV, LAMMPS YAML, and JSON) in the chart window, with column selection and renaming at import time
Add chart display modes (lines, points, lines+points) and a per-chart style dialog, with independent styles for raw and processed series

Add a Postprocess dialog with autocorrelation, polynomial and Birch-Murnaghan equation-of-state curve fits with overlays, and custom-function plotting and nonlinear curve fitting via a vendored JIT-less subset of the Lepton expression parser
Extend the standalone plot mode with derived columns, multi-file overlay, fit x-range, reference lines, editable title and axis labels, and the base filename as the default title
Improve the Birch-Murnaghan EOS post-processing: number-of-atoms input, corrected lattice-constant formula, and clearer V/V0/a0 result labels
Add -c/--chart, -i/--image, and -t/--text command line flags to open files directly

View and convert image files in the snapshot viewer and via ImageMagick in the slideshow viewer, add a standalone slideshow mode, add Start/Stop range controls and a color-coded slider to the slideshow, and keep a stable window size when images have different dimensions
Reorganize and rename File menu entries, add keyboard shortcuts for View Image and Plot Data File, and warn when View Text File is given a binary or image file
Improve the YAML thermo parser to handle the sequence-of-maps format and tolerate trailing commas

Extensive internal refactoring for consistency and testability: short Cfg and Keys constant namespaces, QString-based interfaces, a pure dump-image command builder, and Qt-free least-squares, analysis, and fitting cores
more refactoring for more efficiency and consistency
move some more redundant functionality to helper functions
read and parse color/lights JSON files consistent with LAMMPS
updates and improvements for the documentation
eliminate getMainWindow() function by passing pointer to main widget
add check-for-updates dialog to the About menu to download updated plugins
expand list of shared library locations to search for Ubuntu/Debian and include config dir
update list of test status badges in README and on homepage langing page
update list of commands for help and compute/fix support in dump image
add helper functions for information dialogs and shared library file names
disable access to plot range sliders and plot style while simulation is running
add new "Colors" dialog to ImageViewer that allows to edit, store, and load definitions for per-type colors
add support for new hull_points keyword of LAMMPS versions newer than 30 March 2026 for regions so that union and intersect regions can be approximated for draw styles frame, filled, and transparent
do not attempt to use auto-completion of $-style variable expansions which were often too disrupting and difficult to keep up-to-date
update command help index
enable building flatpak bundles. these are missing the LAMMPS shared library, but this will be offered to download on first use
add extensive compilation and integration testing using github workflows:
Linux flatpak bundle with Qt 6.10
macOS to build .dmg application bundle
Windows Server with MSVC 2022 MinGW64
Linux2Windows cross-compiler in Fedora container to build NSIS installer package
Further refactoring of the core code mostly using Claude Opus 4.6
Major refactor of the code base for consistency and maintainability:
all widgets are created explicitly, QtDesigner created parts of the GUI are converted
remove support for Qt 5.x
remove support for LAMMPS versions before 30 March 2026
use Qt style naming conventions (camel case) throughout
move some more replicated functionality to helper functions
new class URLDownloader to replace downloading of files with LAMMPS' geturl command
support downloading LAMMPS shared library from download.lammps.org if reset of not valid
add button to download LAMMPS shared library from download.lammps.org to preferences
support SHA-256 checksum validation from SHA256SUMS file, if available
updated docs and copilot instructions
Final fixes for next LAMMPS-GUI major release and LAMMPS feature release
Consistently use QCheckBox::isChecked() and QCheckBox::setChecked()
Add preferences settings to enable/disable major/minor grid lines in charts
Add contributing guidelines and a security statement
Reintroduce calls to helper functions to silence and restore stdout for all platforms
Improve Windows code path of StdCapture
Add tests for capture and silencing
Drop into a file selection dialog, if no LAMMPS shared library can be found in plugin mode
Improve error message when no suitable LAMMPS shared library is loaded in plugin mode
Small ChartWindow layout tweaks
Port ChartWindow to use QtGraphs API instead of QtCharts when compiling for Qt 6.10+
Remove "both" options for ellipsoid particles since it is no longer needed
Default settings for ellipsoids is now "triangles"
Use consistent validator instance for all diameter values in the atoms/bond dialog
Avoid accessing expired pointers when shutting down app
Updated documentation
Downloaded precompiled libraries now contain updated LAMMPS code with bugfixes
Update citation of LAMMPS tutorial paper in menu description
Tweak width estimates and string data for "About LAMMPS-GUI" dialog some more
Remove hack to silence and restore stdout for non-run calls to LAMMPS
Refactor about dialog to include more info and use scrollable text fields with auto-scroll
Refactor font initialization to be more consistent across platforms and to avoid crashes
Update Programmer's Guide documentation
Tweak some button names to be more suitable and intuitive
Add help buttons to provide specific online help for compute/fixes, dump image, or the LAMMPS-GUI homepage
Expand documentation of the snapshot image and slide show viewers
Update several screenshot images and add new ones
Add more color maps, add icons to selection list
Make image viewer dialogs more consistent and balanced. Set minimum size.
Rework special particle type selection dialogs
Implement customized dialogs for warnings and critical errors
Implement helper function for uniform export of images either directly or through ImageMagick
Small tweaks to dialog layouts, especially buttons and text field sizes
Add a couple more keyboard shortcuts and a stop button to slideshow viewer
Support by-attribute coloring for body, ellipsoid, line, and tri particles, if a suitable LAMMPS version is used
Add dialog to enable and configure atom / particle and bond visualization settings
Add dialog to enable and configure graphics objects from compute and fixes
Update layout of Image and SlideShow viewers
Update docs for changes to Image and SlideShow viewers
Update help index table
Silence output from calls to LAMMPS that are not part of a run (not on Windows, yet)
Make animated loop delay in slideshow window configurable
Add command line flag to select Qt-style and set to "Fusion" by default
Enforce that all "icon buttons" have a 4x3 shape (not 2x1 like on macOS) and consistent size
Enforce consistent layout spacings across platforms
Implement copy-current-image-to-clipboard functionality for image viewer, charts, and slideshow
Add table for known fixes and computes with graphics data
Update resource file syntax for better Windows compatibility
Fix several small glitches and avoid unexpected crashes
Add support for mirroring and rotating images to slideshow viewer
Make image file name in slideshow selectable by mouse
Export to FFMpeg honors image mirroring and rotating settings
Display body, line, tri, and ellipsoid particles by their lines or faces, if detected
Add dialog for configuring most global image settings
Add support for rendering regions in style "transparent"
Fix issue with centering for 2d systems
Adjust window manager hints for several windows: remove dialog property and maximize button to windows can be on top or below
Try using ImageMagick, if available, when FFMpeg is not found for creating movies
Add option to save scaled/flipped image to slide show viewer
Try using ImageMagick, if available, to convert images when desired format is not available
Update docs for changes to Image and SlideShow viewers
Make image area in SlideShow viewer a scrollable area and auto-adjust window size up to a maximum
Improvements and corrections for tgz binary packaging on Linux
Updates to documentation configuration and remove unused Sphinx extensions
Checked for and enabled compatibility with Sphinx 9.0.x
Added missing Doxygen comments and corrections to Doxygen configuration file
Added packaging of standalone LAMMPS-GUI version for Windows using a pre-compiled basic LAMMPS dll file.
Switch away from system folders to home or desktop folder on Windows
Minor bug fixes
Add -x/-width and -y/-height command line flags to override the main window geometry
Add unit tests for the GUI using Xvfb and PyAutoGUI and some screen shooter wrapper
Bundle pre-compiled shared LAMMPS libraries without dependencies except for libcurl
Download pre-compiled shared LAMMPS library also for unit testing
Block compiling LAMMPS-GUI in plugin mode on Windows
Add entries to run and stop LAMMPS to editor context menu
Update suggested citation to the published LAMMPS tutorial paper
Update copyright header
Update CodeQL workflow
Only enable and use autobond feature if a pair style is defined and if the LAMMPS version (10 September 2025 and later) supports it
Only enable and use region visualization dialon if the LAMMPS version (10 September 2025 and later) supports it
Make LAMMPS-GUI compatible with loading LAMMPS 22 July 2025 update 2 and later instead of requiring 10 September 2025 and later.
Clean up in case a previous write_dump command failed
Avoid segfault in image viewer when using per-atom masses
Add test folder with GoogleTest based testing framework with a few basic tests
Add doxygen style comments to source code and a Programmer's Guide importing them
Create and add Index and add index directives throughout the docs
Small tweaks to the theme colors in use
Update, correct, and reformat installation and compilation instructions
Use new library interface call to determine if LAMMPS supports OpenMP
remove all remaining ifdefs for _OPENMP
When loading library plugin, check if required recently added functions are present and also check the version string.
LAMMPS version 10 September 2025 or later is required for LAMMPS-GUI 1.8
Complete packaging for macOS, Linux tgz and flatpak
Corrections and improvements when building package on Windows
Fix frozen cursor on drag-n-drop bug
Implement drag and drop of text blocks
Remove (unused) support for OpenMP (avoids crashes when loading LAMMPS dynamically with macOS)
Add integration testing and static code analysis to repository, add dependabot support.
Small updates due to tests and dependencies
Update icons and background images for macOS to reflect LAMMPS-GUI
Update use of new icons in LAMMPS-GUI as well except for the LAMMPS status
No build support for WHAM. This is only included if LAMMPS is included
Add/Update files for a proper GitHub repository
Update lammps-gui website URL to the lammps-gui.lammps.org domain
Improve and adapt packaging for standalone packages
Unbundle LAMMPS-GUI from LAMMPS and set it up to have its own git repository
Default to loading shared LAMMPS library dynamically when compiled outside LAMMPS
Search LD_LIBRARY_PATH and equivalent and a few fixed folders for a suitable library
Reorgenize documentation to be its own webpage and set it up during compilation.
Use GitHub Action to translate and deploy docs at online website.
Remove workarounds for compatibility with Qt 5.12 on Ubuntu 20.04LTS.
Qt 5.15LTS is now the minimum required version and thus Ubuntu 22.04LTS.
Support new "dump image autobond" feature in image viewer.
Support new "dump image region" feature in image viewer.
Fix bugs when using filenames or paths with blanks.
Add action to editor context menu to open the Commands_all.html manual page
Change color selections for dump image to text fields with completion and validation.
Update minimum required LAMMPS version.
Reset minor version number for upcoming stable release and tutorial session.
Refactor chartviewer title line to have two rows and add display of units and normalization
Replace rubberband-zoom feature and button to reset zoom with two range sliders
Update minimum required LAMMPS version.
Address the issue of LAMMPS stalling on output by increasing the buffersize for reading from the pipe to the maximum of 64k.
Add warning dialog at the end of a run if I/O buffer usage is high.
Apply fixes and code modernization suggested by clang-tidy
Make selection of accelerator and threads consistent
Cache and restore PATH and LD_LIBRARY_PATH in linux-wrapper.sh so that xdg-open can work with native executables
Rename "Restart LAMMPS" to "Relaunch LAMMPS Instance" and document it.
Fix bug when recentering object in image viewer
Fix crash when editing partially quoted strings
Closing the editor window will close the entire app, even when a simulation is still runnig. Prevent segfaults in that case.
Must delete variable when starting a new run, since we don't always re-launch LAMMPS "clear" does not clear variables
Add support for some common accelerator package command options
GPU: neighbor list on host/device, accelerate only pair style
INTEL: choose double/mixed/single precision
Add support to set the "download solution" and "open tutorial webpage in web browser" default in preferences
Redesign the general settings preferences tab
Display CPU utilization in % during runs
Display a LAMMPS-GUI banner image on new/empty editor windows and clear it when editing or loading a file.
Must set en_US.UTF-8 locale on macOS since it lacks support for C.UTF-8
Disable OpenMP processor affinity
Address performance regression with processing smoothed data
Code refactoring and optimization
Change working directory to user's home dir if initial directory is "/" or the Application folder
Add preferences option to set https proxy, if not already set via environment variable
Add option to visualize molecules defined through the molecule command
Add text fields for editing plot title and axis labels for charts
Add option to automatically open tutorial websites (enabled by default)
Add citation reminder comment to empty documents and the About dialog currently pointing to arXiv.
Add preferences tab for charts to set default for title, plot colors, smooth/raw plot, smooth params
Highlight error URLs with pointers to additional explanations in log window
Double-click on highlighted URL opens it in web browser. Also available via context menu.
Update Tutorial menu entries to cover all 8 tutorials
Highlight warnings and error messages in Output window
Make Tutorial wizards more compact
Include download and compilation of WHAM software from Alan Grossfield
Add entry to Run menu to restart the LAMMPS instance
Use mutex to avoid corruption of thermo data
Move cursor to end of log buffer before inserting new text
Remove empirical filter to remove outliers from corrupted data
Change tutorial download URL to tutorial website
Resolve plugin mode issues.
Add -p command line flag to override path to liblammps.so
Added search and replace functionality
Converged command line argument parsing using Qt facilities
Added dark mode adjustments to syntax highlighting
Add field to enter Atom size, if not determined otherwise
Support plotting raw and smoothed data
Add wizards for setting up LAMMPS tutorials and restart file inspector
First version packaged in flatpak format
